home.heroSubtitle: Explore the space of the internet with absolute freedom. Unmatched speed, complete security, and easy bypass of restrictions with a single click.

features.speedDesc: Our system tests every server around the clock and removes the dead ones automatically.
features.globalDesc: Servers across many countries, each labelled with its flag and latency.
features.shareDesc: Use your subscription on multiple devices at the same time.
features.privacyDesc: We don't track your browsing. Pay once, connect freely.

home.whySubtitle: Everything you need to browse freely, securely, and without limits.
home.whyLightningDesc: Dedicated V2Ray servers ensure smooth browsing and streaming without interruptions.
home.whySecurityDesc: We protect your data and privacy with the strongest encryption techniques, so you can browse safely even on public networks.
home.whyDevicesDesc: Our servers work efficiently on all devices: Android, iPhone, and Windows via the V2Ray app.
home.stepsSubtitle: No technical setup. Get connected in minutes.
home.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds with just your email — no credit card required to start.
home.step2Desc: Choose the server and duration that fit you, then upload your payment receipt.
home.step3Desc: Import your subscription link into the app with one tap and browse freely.
home.serversSubtitle: Every tag is tuned for a specific use-case. Here is exactly what each one does.
home.serverYoutubeDesc: Unblocks everything (ChatGPT, Claude, Facebook, etc.) EXCEPT Gemini. Specifically runs YouTube without annoying ads.
home.serverGeminiDesc: Unblocks all restricted sites and apps, AND successfully unblocks Gemini (which is notoriously difficult for most other VPNs).
home.serverLTEDesc: Unblocks everything (except Gemini). Designed to work reliably even during severe internet disruptions or drone interference (e.g. in Russia). Highly recommended when using a SIM card / mobile data.
home.serverRussiaDesc: Specifically optimized to work inside Russia. These are actually external servers, but they are specially designed to bypass the restrictions on foreign sites in Russia, so they work perfectly to unblock 'white list' blocks and all restricted sites efficiently.
home.serverTorrentDesc: Unblocks everything (except Gemini), and allows high-speed, secure Torrent downloading.
home.blocksTitle: Enjoy freedom of access to all sites and apps
home.networkTitle: Fast servers all over the world

profile.title: Your account
profile.noSub: You don't have a subscription yet.
profile.pendingDesc: We received your receipt. Your subscription activates as soon as an admin approves it.
profile.rejectedDesc: Your last payment was not approved.
profile.buyNewSubDesc: Choose a plan to get a new active subscription.
profile.step2: Download and open the Hupp app.
profile.step3: Tap the '+' icon at the top right, then choose 'Add from Clipboard'.
profile.step4: Tap the big round button to connect and enjoy!
profile.ipsTooltip: What is an IP? Every internet connection (Wi-Fi, mobile data) assigns your device a unique IP address. We allow up to 20 unique IPs per 24h to prevent account sharing. Switching between Wi-Fi and Cellular uses different IPs. Do not share your subscription publicly.
profile.updateTipDesc: If the network drops or servers stop working, just click the "Update Subscription" button in the app. It will fetch new working servers instantly!
profile.routingGuideTitle: ⚡ Pro Tip: Optimize Speed & Prevent Blocking
profile.routingGuideDesc: To ensure maximum speed and keep servers from getting blocked, configure Hupp to bypass local websites (like Russian sites or local apps) so they open directly without using the VPN.
profile.routingStep1: Tap the 'Copy Bypass Rules' button below.
profile.routingStep2: In Hupp, go to Settings -> Routing profiles.
profile.routingStep3: Tap the three dots (⋮) in the top right and select 'Import from clipboard'.
profile.routingStep4: Select the newly added profile ('Bypass Russia') and turn ON 'Use Routing'.
profile.routingStep5: Your connection is now fully optimized!

repos.title: GitHub repositories
repos.hint: Add repos whose .txt files hold server links. The scheduled worker tests them and updates the live pool.
repos.recheckHint: Re-fetch every repo, retest all servers, drop the ones that no longer work.
repos.syncRequested: ✓ Re-check started — the local worker will refresh the server list shortly.
repos.lteRecheckHint: Run on LTE to test the live pool over the mobile network. Working servers become LTE-tier.
repos.lteRequested: 📶 LTE re-check started — testing the pool over the mobile network.
repos.geminiWifiRecheckHint: Run to test if Wi-Fi servers can reach Gemini.
repos.geminiLteRecheckHint: Run to test if LTE servers can reach Gemini.
repos.geminiRequested: ✨ Gemini re-check started — testing which servers can reach Gemini.
repos.wifiCascadeHint: Phase 1: Wi-Fi, then Phase 2: Gemini. Connect your HOME Wi-Fi — VPN turns off during the test, back on to upload.
repos.lteCascadeHint: Phase 1: LTE, then Phase 2: Gemini. Connect your PHONE hotspot (mobile data) — VPN turns off during the test, back on to upload.
repos.duplicateWarning: This repository is already added! Please use a different URL.
repos.filesHint: Number of text files found in the repository
repos.instructionsTitle: How to test servers from your local machine?
repos.instructionsIntro: Since Supabase is blocked on certain networks, the Worker needs a VPN to communicate with the database. However, testing VPN servers while a VPN is active causes inaccurate results. Therefore, you must manually toggle your VPN during tests.
repos.instructionsStep1: Keep your VPN turned ON. Start the Worker (start-worker.bat). It will connect to Supabase and wait for your commands.
repos.instructionsStep2: Click a test button (Wi-Fi, LTE, etc.) from this dashboard. Watch the Worker console.
repos.instructionsStep3: The Worker will display: 🔴 STOP! TURN OFF YOUR VPN NOW! You have 15 seconds to turn off your VPN.
repos.instructionsStep4: Testing will begin on your real, unfiltered internet connection to ensure accurate results.
repos.instructionsStep5: When finished, the Worker displays: ✅ TESTING FINISHED! Please TURN YOUR VPN BACK ON now!
repos.instructionsStep6: Turn your VPN back on. The Worker will automatically detect the connection and upload the results to Supabase.
repos.instructionsNote: Note: Make sure you are connected to the correct network for your test (e.g., disable Wi-Fi and use Mobile Hotspot for LTE tests).
repos.extractedHint: Number of VPN configs extracted from all files
repos.workingHint: Number of configs that passed the connectivity test
repos.lastSyncHint: Last time this repo was synced
repos.neverSynced: Not synced yet — run a check to see stats.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about GalaxyVPN.

whatIsVpn.q: How does GalaxyVPN differ from regular VPNs?
whatIsVpn.a: Standard VPNs (like OpenVPN or WireGuard) are easily detected and blocked by Deep Packet Inspection (DPI) in countries with strict censorship. We use advanced proxy protocols (V2Ray/VLESS/Reality) that disguise your traffic as normal web browsing, ensuring you stay connected when other VPNs fail.

howToUse.q: How do I activate and use my subscription?
howToUse.a: After you pay and get your receipt approved, you will receive a subscription link in your profile. You just need to download the 'Hupp' app (or any V2Ray client like v2rayNG/Shadowrocket), add the link, and hit connect. The app will automatically download all working servers.

whichDevices.q: Which devices and apps do you support?
whichDevices.a: Our service works on any device that supports V2Ray/VLESS. We highly recommend 'Hupp' or 'v2rayN' for Windows, 'v2rayNG' or 'Hiddify' for Android, and 'Shadowrocket' or 'V2Box' for iOS.

paymentMethods.q: How long does it take to activate my account?
paymentMethods.a: Once you transfer the payment via Sber Bank and upload the screenshot of the receipt, our admins review it manually. Approvals typically take just a few minutes during active hours.

howManyDevices.q: Can I share my subscription link with friends?
howManyDevices.a: Your plan includes multi-device sharing for personal use across your own phone, tablet, and PC. However, sharing the link publicly or with too many different IPs will trigger our abuse detection and may result in an automatic ban.

serverDifference.q: What is the difference between Wi-Fi and LTE plans?
serverDifference.a: Mobile networks (LTE/4G) use much stricter firewalls than home Wi-Fi. A server that works on Wi-Fi is often blocked on LTE. Our 'LTE / Wi-Fi' plans give you access to premium servers that are rigorously tested to bypass strict mobile carrier DPI.

geminiServer.a: Google Gemini uses advanced geographic and VPN detection that blocks almost all VPNs. Our Gemini-tier servers use specialized routing to completely bypass this detection, giving you reliable access to Gemini AI while keeping your internet unblocked.

lteServer.q: Do the servers ever stop working?
lteServer.a: Censors constantly try to block VPNs, so individual servers will inevitably die. However, our automated system tests all servers continuously from inside restricted networks. If a server dies, we replace it. All you have to do is 'Update' your subscription in the app to get the fresh servers.

cancelRefund.q: Why does the VPN slow down my local websites?
cancelRefund.a: By default, all your traffic goes through the VPN. For maximum speed, we recommend using 'Routing Rules' in your app to bypass local websites (like Russian banks or local streaming) so they open directly. Check the 'Pro Tip' section in your profile for a quick guide.

notWorking.q: What should I do if my VPN stops connecting?
notWorking.a: 1. Try another server from the list. 2. Tap 'Update Subscription' in your app to fetch newly tested working servers. 3. Ensure you are using the correct network type for your plan (e.g., you can't use a Wi-Fi server on mobile data). 4. Contact support if the issue persists.
